The '''''Dominator''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]].

==Details==
This [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Loka Hask]] after he joined the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]]. He used the ship in his hunt for the famed [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], several months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

[[File:Wormhole_Dominator.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The end of the ''Dominator''.]]

Hask used this ship in his effort to retrieve the [[Phantom Project]] technology on [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]]. The ''Dominator'' was destroyed by the [[gravitic polarization beam]] activated by [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]] when the ship was about to destroy the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
The [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''<ref name="CWSE">{{CSWECite|I|196|''Dominator'' (2)}}</ref> states that the Dominator is a modified [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]], when [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 8|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 8]]<ref name="RS8">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 8|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 8]]</ref> and the ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' itself<ref name="CWSE" /> depict the ''Dominator'' as what the ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' identifies as an [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]].<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> This article assumes the ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' is incorrect in that regard.
